B{rffi{ iffir{+,rr MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economics Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22rd J anuary, 2021 G.S.R. 41(E).-In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (d) and (e) of sub-section (2) of section 24 of the Coinage Act, 20 I I ( 1 I of 201 I ), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namely: - l. Short title and commencement.- (l) These rules may be called the Coinage (Issue of Commemorative Coins to commemorate on the occasion of 125rH BIRTH ANNMRSARY OF SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDA"TI MAI{ARA"I) Rules, 202 1. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Denomination of coins.- The coins of One Hundred Rupees, Fifty Rupees and Ten Rupees denominations shall only be coined at the Mint for issue under the authority of the Central Government to commemorate on the occasion of "125rH BIRTH ANNMRSARY OF SRIMAT SUIAMI PRANAVANANDA"II MAHARAJ'. 3. Dimension and composition of coins. - The coins of the above denominations mentioned in rule 2 shall conform to the following dimensions and composition, namely: - -- 4 of 6 -- t$rrT Il-qu-s 3(i)l rlT{it s'T {rrtl=i : 3i-tIT8IT(uI' 5 Denomination of coin Shape and outside diameter Number of serrations Metal composition (1) (2) (3) (4) Circular 44 millimeters 200 Quaternary Alloy Silver - 50 per cent Copper -40 per cent Nickel - 05 per cent Zinc - 05 per cent 180 Quaternary AIIoy Silver - 50 per cent Copper -40 per cent Nickel - 05 per cent Zinc - 05 per cent Ten Rupees Circular 27 millimeters (Bi-metallic) r00 Outer Rine Nickel Brass Copper -75 per cent Zinc - 20 per cent Nickel - 05 per cent Centre Piece Nickel Silver Copper -65 per cent Zinc - 15percent Nickel - 20 per cent 1. Design.- The design of the coins shall be as specified in the First Schedule to these rules. 2. Standard weight and remedy allowed.- The standard weight of the coins of above denomination coined to commemorate the occasion of 125rH BIRTH ANNMRSARY OF SRIMAT SWAMI pRANAVAIANDA.JI MAHARA"I and the remedy allowed in making of such coins shall be as specified in the Second Schedule to these rules. The First Schedule (See rule 4) (i) oNE HUNDRED RUPEES OBVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the centre with the legend ..Itettf qqt, inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word "$lTkP' in Devnagri script and on the right periphery with the word "INDIA" in English. It shall also bear the Rupee symbol .,?', and denominational value "100" in the International Numerals below the Lion Capitol. REVERSE: This face of coin shall bear the portrait of SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDAJI MAHARAJ. The inscription "*rtqrftrru|-{Iriq*T{r{rqft rzs ffq{#'is depicted on the upper periphery of the coin. On the lower periphery of the coin the inscription "125rH BIRTH ANNIVERSARY OF SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDAJI MAHARAJ'' iN ENgIiSh iS dEPiCtEd. The year *2021" in International Numeral shall be written below the image of SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDAJI MAHARAJ. (ii) FrFTY RUPEES OBVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the centre with the legend *qgfu q{il' inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word "flTkP' in Devnagri script and on the right periphery with the word "INDIA" in English. It shall also bear the Rupee symbol ,.{,, and denominational value "50" in the International Numerals below the Lion Capitol. REVERSE: This face of coin shall bear the portrait of SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDAJI MAHARAJ. The inscription "4rfe grfr qufflri(fr EEr{fq fr f zs fi q{#' is depicted on the upper periphery of the coin. On the lower periphery of the coin the inscription "125rrl BIRTH One Hundred Rupees Fifty Rupees Circular 39 millimeters -- 5 of 6 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [Penr II-Sec. 3(D]- ANNMRSARY OF SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDAJI MAHARAJ" in English is depicted. The year *2021" in Intemational Numeral shall be written below the image of SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDAJI MAHARAJ. (iiD TEN RUPEES OBVERSE: This face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the centre with the legend "(tar[t{ sil{il' inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word "TlTkP' in Devnagri script and on the right periphery with the word "INDIA" in English. It shall also bear the Rupee symbol '6{" and denominational value "10" in the International Numerals below the Lion Capitol. REVERSE: This face of coin shall bear the portrait of SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDAJI MAHARAJ. The inscription "ftrc qrft gur+Fi(ft T{r<re ft rZS fi wqf is depicted on the upper periphery of the coin. On the lower periphery of the coin the inscription "125rH BIRTH ANNMRSARY OF SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDAJI MAHARAJ" in English is depicted. The year *2021" in International Numeral written below the image of SRIMAT SWAMI PRANAVANANDAJI MAHARAJ. Second Schedule (See rule 5) I F.No. 02 I I 0 I 2020-Coin] SHASHANK SAKSENA, Senior Economic Adviser Denomination of coln Standard weight Remedy allowed In composition In standard weight (l) (2) (3) (4) One Hundred Rupees 35.00 Grams 1/500'h plus or minus for Silver that is to say the Silver content may vary from 498 to 502 per 1000. 1/100* plus or minus, that is to say weight could vary from 34.65 grams to 35.35 grams. Fifty Rupees 22.50 Grams 1i500th plus or minus for Silver, that is to say the Silver content may vary fiom 498 to 502 per r000. l/40th plus or minus, that is to say weight could be from 21.94 grams to 23.06 grams. Ten Rupees 7.74 Grams Outer Ring (Nickel Brass): l/100th Plus or Minus both for Copper andZinc, that is to say, Copper content could vary from 74Yo to 76%o and Zinc content from 19o/o to 21Yo and I /200th plus or minus for Nickel, that is to say Nickel content could vary from 4.5o/oto 5.5Yo Centre Piece (Nickel Silver): 1/100th plus or minus for both Copper andZinc, that is to say, Copper content could vary from 64%, to 66Yo and Zinc content from 14oh to 16Yo and 1/100m plus or minus for Nickel, that is to say Nickel content could vary from l9Yo to 2lVo. 1/40'n plus or minus, that is to say, the weight could vary from 7.55 grams to 7.93 grams.
